name: vwc-matrix-phat
description: Build scripts for VWC demo bundle only; end users open demo/vwc-matrix-demo.html without running npm.

scripts.build:demo: tailwindcss -c demo/tailwind.config.cjs -i demo/tw-input.css -o demo/vwc-matrix-demo.css --minify && esbuild demo/demo-entry.jsx --bundle --outfile=demo/vwc-matrix-demo.bundle.js --format=iife --platform=browser --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=transform
